'''Tavin Notsil''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of [[Aldivy]].

Tavin was the brother of [[Lara Notsil]], and both were residents of [[New Oldtown]]. A generally unsavory individual, Tavin was supposed to be in the town jail when New Oldtown was destroyed by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']]. He was presumed dead, but had actually managed to escape this fate, by making arrangements with the town constable to leave the city and take a naval job under an assumed name.

When [[Gara Petothel]] assumed Lara Notsil's identity for the purpose of returning to [[Zsinj]]'s forces, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Melvar]] located Tavin and used him to make contact with Petothel. He awaited her in a prefabricated house erected on the ruins of New Oldtown, accompanied by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Todrin Rossik]].

Petothel went to her rendezvous, but refused Rossik's offer. From a sniper position nearby, [[Myn Donos]] killed Tavin Notsil while Petothel blasted Rossik.
